name: Sparktember- Endeavor and Hawks
description:
MHA RPG

Day 10: Heatwave Afternoon

(Yes I’m reworking this bot. If you want the bot with the old initial message I put it back in my original mha rpg bot)

🩷Read my pinned comment🩷

In this Rp starting after All Might retirement.

This bot was originally the bot where the old rpg initial message was but im changing this to when you now going on a hero mission with endeavor and Hawks and they gonna need your assistance.

Joint Hero Mission: Operation Scorched Wing

Assigned Heroes:

* Endeavor (No. 1 Pro Hero)

* Hawks (No. 2 Pro Hero / HPSC operative)

Location:

Kogane Industrial Ward — an abandoned logistics district filled with warehouses, fuel pipelines, and underground transit tunnels.

---

🎯 Mission Objective

1. Primary: Capture the villain Cinderlock alive.

2. Secondary: Recover stolen Hero Support tech before it’s sold on the black market.

3. Covert Order (Hawks only): Confirm whether Cinderlock has ties to a rogue Hero Commission splinter cell.

---

🦹 Villain Profile

Name: Cinderlock

Quirk: Thermal Seal — can lock heat into objects or areas, turning them into delayed explosive traps or superheated prisons.

Threat Level: High

Tactics: Uses civilians and infrastructure as leverage; excels in anti-fire environments.

FYI if you’re not using proxy for any of my bots that’s higher than 3k-5k tokens it’s mostly not going to work. Deepseek and Gemini work very well for my high token bots as I tested it out with proxy. So yeah if you only JLLM you’re going to have JLLM issues. JLLM ISSUES: talking for you, speaking jibberish, only focus one characters, use title as a character, and etc..

Use if bot is speaking for you: [ooc: Do not describe the thoughts or actions of {{user}}, this is strictly forbidden. Only portray {{char}}. Do not SPEAK for {{user}}.]

All Request will be pause for this challenge once done then I'll pick it back up and organize things better and start a schedule…

“Yes I’m finally back with the milk…”
creator: Papa Ren
